description: Investigation-focused NOC dashboard for one vessel. Use the shared dashboard links to move between NOC support, the incident workbench, fleet view, and the mapped legacy Ship Operations dashboard.

links.title: Ship Operations (Legacy)
links.tooltip: Legacy telemetry demo mapped to vessel_001 / MV Edge Aurora

links.title: Fleet Overview
links.tooltip: Fleet-wide UDS health and correlation view

links.title: UDS Incident Workbench
links.tooltip: Incident-first view for the selected vessel (24h window)

links.title: NOC Support
links.tooltip: Stay in the broader troubleshooting view for the selected vessel

links.title: Alert Trends
links.tooltip: Predictive alert frequency analysis (rising / falling / stable)

links.title: AI Chat
links.tooltip: Ask the AI assistant about fleet, incidents, or specific vessels

options.content:
## NOC investigation flow

Use `time_window` to set the troubleshooting window. Leave `app_filter` on `All Applications` for vessel-wide investigation, or narrow to one app to focus the timeline and metric history. Historical charts aggregate across the selected app set. Click `app_id` in the tables to open the Scope 1 incident workbench for that vessel/app pair.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM alerts al JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = al.uds_location_id WHERE u.imo_nr = '$vessel' AND COALESCE(LOWER(al.status), 'firing') NOT IN ('resolved', 'closed', 'completed', 'cleared') AND (al.ends_at IS NULL OR al.ends_at > NOW())

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM alerts al JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = al.uds_location_id WHERE u.imo_nr = '$vessel' AND LOWER(COALESCE(al.severity, 'warning')) = 'critical' AND COALESCE(LOWER(al.status), 'firing') NOT IN ('resolved', 'closed', 'completed', 'cleared') AND (al.ends_at IS NULL OR al.ends_at > NOW())
SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(ms.time))) AS value FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel'
SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(l.logged_at))) AS value FROM app_logs l JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = l.uds_location_id WHERE u.imo_nr = '$vessel'

WITH selected_vessel AS ( SELECT id FROM udslocations WHERE imo_nr = '$vessel' ), latest_metrics AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (ms.application_instance_id, ms.metric_name) ms.application_instance_id, ms.metric_name, ms.time, ms.value FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel' ORDER BY ms.application_instance_id, ms.metric_name, ms.time DESC ), active_alerts AS ( SELECT al.application_id, COUNT(*)::int AS active_alert_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(al.severity, 'warning')) = 'critical')::int AS critical_alert_count FROM alerts al JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = al.uds_location_id WHERE COALESCE(LOWER(al.status), 'firing') NOT IN ('resolved', 'closed', 'completed', 'cleared') AND (al.ends_at IS NULL OR al.ends_at > NOW()) GROUP BY al.application_id ), latest_alert AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (al.application_id) al.application_id, al.alert_name, al.severity, COALESCE(al.ends_at, al.starts_at) AS latest_incident_at FROM alerts al JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = al.uds_location_id ORDER BY al.application_id, COALESCE(al.ends_at, al.starts_at) DESC, al.starts_at DESC ), latest_logs AS ( SELECT COALESCE(l.application_id, a_map.id) AS application_id, MAX(l.logged_at) AS latest_log_at FROM app_logs l JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = l.uds_location_id LEFT JOIN applications a_map ON LOWER(a_map.external_id) = LOWER(COALESCE(l.app_external_id, '')) GROUP BY COALESCE(l.application_id, a_map.id) ) SELECT a.name AS application, a.external_id AS app_id, CASE WHEN COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'service_up' THEN lm.value END), 1) <= 0 OR COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'health_check_status' THEN lm.value END), 1) <= 0 OR COALESCE(aa.critical_alert_count, 0) > 0 THEN 'critical' WHEN COALESCE(aa.active_alert_count, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'reporting_stale' THEN lm.value END), 0) >= 1 OR COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'sync_delayed' THEN lm.value END), 0) >= 1 THEN 'degraded' ELSE 'healthy' END AS status, COALESCE(aa.active_alert_count, 0) AS active_alerts, COALESCE(aa.critical_alert_count, 0) AS critical_alerts, la.alert_name AS latest_alert, la.severity AS latest_severity, la.latest_incident_at AS latest_incident, MAX(lm.time) AS latest_metric, ll.latest_log_at AS latest_log, ROUND(COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'last_sync_age_seconds' THEN lm.value END), 0)::numeric, 0) AS last_sync_age_seconds, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'reporting_stale' THEN lm.value END), 0)::int AS reporting_stale, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'sync_delayed' THEN lm.value END), 0)::int AS sync_delayed, ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'http_error_rate_5xx' THEN lm.value END)::numeric, 2) AS http_5xx_percent, ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'process_cpu_usage' THEN lm.value END)::numeric, 2) AS cpu_percent FROM selected_vessel sv JOIN uds_location_application_instances uai ON uai.uds_location_id = sv.id JOIN applications a ON a.id = uai.application_instance_id LEFT JOIN latest_metrics lm ON lm.application_instance_id = a.id LEFT JOIN active_alerts aa ON aa.application_id = a.id LEFT JOIN latest_alert la ON la.application_id = a.id LEFT JOIN latest_logs ll ON ll.application_id = a.id WHERE '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(a.external_id) = LOWER('$app_filter') GROUP BY a.id, a.name, a.external_id, aa.active_alert_count, aa.critical_alert_count, la.alert_name, la.severity, la.latest_incident_at, ll.latest_log_at ORDER BY COALESCE(aa.active_alert_count, 0) DESC, COALESCE(la.latest_incident_at, ll.latest_log_at, MAX(lm.time)) DESC NULLS LAST, a.name

WITH selected_vessel AS ( SELECT id FROM udslocations WHERE imo_nr = '$vessel' ), window_start AS ( SELECT NOW() - INTERVAL '${time_window}' AS ts ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT al.starts_at AS time, 'alert_started' AS event_type, COALESCE(a.name, 'unknown') AS application, COALESCE(a.external_id, al.labels ->> 'app_id', '') AS app_id, COALESCE(al.severity, 'warning') AS severity, al.alert_type AS category, 'firing' AS state, COALESCE(al.annotations ->> 'summary', al.alert_name) AS message, al.fingerprint AS correlation FROM alerts al JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = al.uds_location_id LEFT JOIN applications a ON a.id = al.application_id CROSS JOIN window_start ws WHERE al.starts_at >= ws.ts AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.external_id, al.labels ->> 'app_id', '')) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) UNION ALL SELECT al.ends_at AS time, 'alert_resolved' AS event_type, COALESCE(a.name, 'unknown') AS application, COALESCE(a.external_id, al.labels ->> 'app_id', '') AS app_id, COALESCE(al.severity, 'warning') AS severity, al.alert_type AS category, 'resolved' AS state, COALESCE(al.annotations ->> 'summary', al.alert_name) || ' resolved' AS message, al.fingerprint AS correlation FROM alerts al JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = al.uds_location_id LEFT JOIN applications a ON a.id = al.application_id CROSS JOIN window_start ws WHERE al.ends_at IS NOT NULL AND al.ends_at >= ws.ts AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.external_id, al.labels ->> 'app_id', '')) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) UNION ALL SELECT l.logged_at AS time, 'log' AS event_type, COALESCE(a.name, l.app_external_id, 'unknown') AS application, COALESCE(a.external_id, l.app_external_id, '') AS app_id, LOWER(l.level) AS severity, l.source AS category, 'observed' AS state, l.message AS message, l.correlation_key AS correlation FROM app_logs l JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = l.uds_location_id LEFT JOIN applications a ON a.id = l.application_id CROSS JOIN window_start ws WHERE l.logged_at >= ws.ts AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.source, '')) <> 'alerts' AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.external_id, l.app_external_id, '')) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) ) timeline ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500

WITH selected_vessel AS ( SELECT id FROM udslocations WHERE imo_nr = '$vessel' ), window_start AS ( SELECT NOW() - INTERVAL '${time_window}' AS ts ), alert_window AS ( SELECT al.application_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(al.severity, 'warning')) = 'critical')::int AS critical_alerts, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(al.severity, 'warning')) = 'warning')::int AS warning_alerts, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE al.ends_at IS NOT NULL OR LOWER(COALESCE(al.status, 'firing')) IN ('resolved', 'closed', 'completed', 'cleared'))::int AS resolved_alerts, MAX(COALESCE(al.ends_at, al.starts_at)) AS last_alert_event FROM alerts al JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = al.uds_location_id CROSS JOIN window_start ws WHERE al.starts_at >= ws.ts OR (al.ends_at IS NOT NULL AND al.ends_at >= ws.ts) OR (al.starts_at < ws.ts AND (al.ends_at IS NULL OR al.ends_at >= ws.ts)) GROUP BY al.application_id ), log_window AS ( SELECT COALESCE(l.application_id, a_map.id) AS application_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE LOWER(l.level) IN ('error', 'critical'))::int AS error_logs, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE LOWER(l.level) = 'warning')::int AS warning_logs, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE LOWER(l.level) = 'info')::int AS info_logs, MAX(l.logged_at) AS last_log_at FROM app_logs l JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = l.uds_location_id LEFT JOIN applications a_map ON LOWER(a_map.external_id) = LOWER(COALESCE(l.app_external_id, '')) CROSS JOIN window_start ws WHERE l.logged_at >= ws.ts AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.source, '')) <> 'alerts' GROUP BY COALESCE(l.application_id, a_map.id) ) SELECT a.name AS application, a.external_id AS app_id, COALESCE(aw.critical_alerts, 0) AS critical_alerts, COALESCE(aw.warning_alerts, 0) AS warning_alerts, COALESCE(aw.resolved_alerts, 0) AS resolved_alerts, COALESCE(lw.error_logs, 0) AS error_logs, COALESCE(lw.warning_logs, 0) AS warning_logs, COALESCE(lw.info_logs, 0) AS info_logs, (COALESCE(aw.critical_alerts, 0) + COALESCE(aw.warning_alerts, 0) + COALESCE(lw.error_logs, 0) + COALESCE(lw.warning_logs, 0))::int AS attention_score, NULLIF(GREATEST(COALESCE(aw.last_alert_event, to_timestamp(0)), COALESCE(lw.last_log_at, to_timestamp(0))), to_timestamp(0)) AS last_event FROM selected_vessel sv JOIN uds_location_application_instances uai ON uai.uds_location_id = sv.id JOIN applications a ON a.id = uai.application_instance_id LEFT JOIN alert_window aw ON aw.application_id = a.id LEFT JOIN log_window lw ON lw.application_id = a.id WHERE '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(a.external_id) = LOWER('$app_filter') ORDER BY attention_score DESC, last_event DESC NULLS LAST, a.name

WITH selected_vessel AS ( SELECT id FROM udslocations WHERE imo_nr = '$vessel' ), window_start AS ( SELECT NOW() - INTERVAL '${time_window}' AS ts ) SELECT COALESCE(a.name, 'unknown') AS application, COALESCE(a.external_id, al.labels ->> 'app_id', '') AS app_id, al.alert_name AS alert, COALESCE(al.severity, 'warning') AS severity, CASE WHEN al.ends_at IS NOT NULL OR LOWER(COALESCE(al.status, 'firing')) IN ('resolved', 'closed', 'completed', 'cleared') THEN 'resolved' ELSE COALESCE(al.status, 'firing') END AS status, al.alert_type AS type, al.starts_at AS started, al.ends_at AS ended, ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(al.ends_at, NOW()) - al.starts_at)) / 60.0)::numeric, 1) AS duration_min, COALESCE(al.annotations ->> 'summary', al.alert_name) AS summary FROM alerts al JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = al.uds_location_id LEFT JOIN applications a ON a.id = al.application_id CROSS JOIN window_start ws WHERE ( al.starts_at >= ws.ts OR (al.ends_at IS NOT NULL AND al.ends_at >= ws.ts) OR (al.starts_at < ws.ts AND (al.ends_at IS NULL OR al.ends_at >= ws.ts)) ) AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.external_id, al.labels ->> 'app_id', '')) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) ORDER BY al.starts_at DESC

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ms.time) AS time, ms.metric_name AS metric, MAX(ms.value) AS value FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel' AND ms.metric_name = 'last_sync_age_seconds' AND $__timeFilter(ms.time) AND ms.time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${time_window}' AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(ms.app_id) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ms.time) AS time, ms.metric_name AS metric, MAX(ms.value) AS value FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel' AND ms.metric_name IN ('reporting_stale', 'sync_delayed') AND $__timeFilter(ms.time) AND ms.time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${time_window}' AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(ms.app_id) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ms.time) AS time, ms.metric_name AS metric, AVG(ms.value) AS value FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel' AND ms.metric_name IN ('http_request_duration_p95', 'http_error_rate_5xx', 'http_error_rate_4xx', 'dotnet_exceptions_rate') AND $__timeFilter(ms.time) AND ms.time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${time_window}' AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(ms.app_id) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ms.time) AS time, ms.metric_name AS metric, AVG(ms.value) AS value FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel' AND ms.metric_name IN ('process_cpu_usage', 'process_open_handles') AND $__timeFilter(ms.time) AND ms.time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${time_window}' AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(ms.app_id) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ms.time) AS time, ms.metric_name AS metric, AVG(ms.value) AS value FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel' AND ms.metric_name = 'process_memory_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(ms.time) AND ms.time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${time_window}' AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(ms.app_id) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ms.time) AS time, ms.metric_name AS metric, AVG(ms.value) AS value FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel' AND ms.metric_name IN ('db_query_duration_avg', 'db_query_duration_p95', 'db_query_rate', 'db_query_errors', 'db_deadlocks') AND $__timeFilter(ms.time) AND ms.time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${time_window}' AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(ms.app_id) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

WITH filtered_metrics AS ( SELECT ms.metric_name, ms.value, ms.time, ms.metric_unit FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel' AND $__timeFilter(ms.time) AND ms.time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${time_window}' AND ( '$app_filter' = '__all' OR LOWER(ms.app_id) = LOWER('$app_filter') ) ) SELECT fm.metric_name AS metric, CASE WHEN '$app_filter' = '__all' THEN 'all_apps' ELSE '$app_filter' END AS scope, ROUND(MIN(fm.value)::numeric, 4) AS min_value, ROUND(AVG(fm.value)::numeric, 4) AS avg_value, ROUND(MAX(fm.value)::numeric, 4) AS max_value, ROUND(((ARRAY_AGG(fm.value ORDER BY fm.time DESC))[1])::numeric, 4) AS latest_value, MAX(fm.metric_unit) AS unit, MAX(fm.time) AS latest_sample FROM filtered_metrics fm GROUP BY fm.metric_name ORDER BY CASE fm.metric_name WHEN 'service_up' THEN 1 WHEN 'health_check_status' THEN 2 WHEN 'process_uptime_seconds' THEN 3 WHEN 'last_sync_age_seconds' THEN 4 WHEN 'reporting_stale' THEN 5 WHEN 'sync_delayed' THEN 6 WHEN 'http_request_duration_p95' THEN 7 WHEN 'http_error_rate_5xx' THEN 8 WHEN 'http_error_rate_4xx' THEN 9 WHEN 'dotnet_exceptions_rate' THEN 10 WHEN 'process_cpu_usage' THEN 11 WHEN 'process_memory_bytes' THEN 12 WHEN 'process_open_handles' THEN 13 WHEN 'db_query_duration_avg' THEN 14 WHEN 'db_query_duration_p95' THEN 15 WHEN 'db_query_rate' THEN 16 WHEN 'db_query_errors' THEN 17 WHEN 'db_deadlocks' THEN 18 ELSE 99 END

list.definition: SELECT imo_nr AS __value, name || ' (' || imo_nr || ')' AS __text FROM udslocations WHERE imo_nr IS NOT NULL ORDER BY name
list.description: Select one vessel by IMO number
list.label: Vessel
list.name: vessel
list.query: SELECT imo_nr AS __value, name || ' (' || imo_nr || ')' AS __text FROM udslocations WHERE imo_nr IS NOT NULL ORDER BY name

list.definition: SELECT '1 hour' AS __value, 'Last 1h' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT '6 hours' AS __value, 'Last 6h' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT '12 hours' AS __value, 'Last 12h' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT '24 hours' AS __value, 'Last 24h' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT '48 hours' AS __value, 'Last 48h' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT '7 days' AS __value, 'Last 7d' AS __text
list.description: Investigation window for timeline, alert history, connectivity, and historical metrics
list.label: Time Window
list.name: time_window
list.query: SELECT '1 hour' AS __value, 'Last 1h' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT '6 hours' AS __value, 'Last 6h' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT '12 hours' AS __value, 'Last 12h' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT '24 hours' AS __value, 'Last 24h' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT '48 hours' AS __value, 'Last 48h' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT '7 days' AS __value, 'Last 7d' AS __text

list.definition: WITH selected_vessel AS ( SELECT id FROM udslocations WHERE imo_nr = '$vessel' ), latest_metrics AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (ms.application_instance_id, ms.metric_name) ms.application_instance_id, ms.metric_name, ms.time, ms.value FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel' ORDER BY ms.application_instance_id, ms.metric_name, ms.time DESC ), active_alerts AS ( SELECT al.application_id, COUNT(*)::int AS active_alert_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(al.severity, 'warning')) = 'critical')::int AS critical_alert_count FROM alerts al JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = al.uds_location_id WHERE COALESCE(LOWER(al.status), 'firing') NOT IN ('resolved', 'closed', 'completed', 'cleared') AND (al.ends_at IS NULL OR al.ends_at > NOW()) GROUP BY al.application_id ), app_board AS ( SELECT a.external_id AS app_id, a.name AS app_name, CASE WHEN COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'service_up' THEN lm.value END), 1) <= 0 OR COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'health_check_status' THEN lm.value END), 1) <= 0 OR COALESCE(aa.critical_alert_count, 0) > 0 THEN 'critical' WHEN COALESCE(aa.active_alert_count, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'reporting_stale' THEN lm.value END), 0) >= 1 OR COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'sync_delayed' THEN lm.value END), 0) >= 1 THEN 'degraded' ELSE 'healthy' END AS operational_status, COALESCE(aa.active_alert_count, 0) AS active_alerts FROM selected_vessel sv JOIN uds_location_application_instances uai ON uai.uds_location_id = sv.id JOIN applications a ON a.id = uai.application_instance_id LEFT JOIN latest_metrics lm ON lm.application_instance_id = a.id LEFT JOIN active_alerts aa ON aa.application_id = a.id GROUP BY a.id, a.external_id, a.name, aa.active_alert_count, aa.critical_alert_count ) SELECT app_id AS __value, app_name || ' | ' || operational_status || ' | alerts=' || active_alerts AS __text FROM app_board ORDER BY CASE operational_status WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'degraded' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, active_alerts DESC, app_name
list.description: Optional app focus for timeline and history. Leave on All Applications for vessel-wide troubleshooting.
list.label: Application Filter
list.name: app_filter
list.query: WITH selected_vessel AS ( SELECT id FROM udslocations WHERE imo_nr = '$vessel' ), latest_metrics AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (ms.application_instance_id, ms.metric_name) ms.application_instance_id, ms.metric_name, ms.time, ms.value FROM metric_samples ms WHERE ms.imo_nr = '$vessel' ORDER BY ms.application_instance_id, ms.metric_name, ms.time DESC ), active_alerts AS ( SELECT al.application_id, COUNT(*)::int AS active_alert_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(al.severity, 'warning')) = 'critical')::int AS critical_alert_count FROM alerts al JOIN selected_vessel sv ON sv.id = al.uds_location_id WHERE COALESCE(LOWER(al.status), 'firing') NOT IN ('resolved', 'closed', 'completed', 'cleared') AND (al.ends_at IS NULL OR al.ends_at > NOW()) GROUP BY al.application_id ), app_board AS ( SELECT a.external_id AS app_id, a.name AS app_name, CASE WHEN COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'service_up' THEN lm.value END), 1) <= 0 OR COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'health_check_status' THEN lm.value END), 1) <= 0 OR COALESCE(aa.critical_alert_count, 0) > 0 THEN 'critical' WHEN COALESCE(aa.active_alert_count, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'reporting_stale' THEN lm.value END), 0) >= 1 OR COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN lm.metric_name = 'sync_delayed' THEN lm.value END), 0) >= 1 THEN 'degraded' ELSE 'healthy' END AS operational_status, COALESCE(aa.active_alert_count, 0) AS active_alerts FROM selected_vessel sv JOIN uds_location_application_instances uai ON uai.uds_location_id = sv.id JOIN applications a ON a.id = uai.application_instance_id LEFT JOIN latest_metrics lm ON lm.application_instance_id = a.id LEFT JOIN active_alerts aa ON aa.application_id = a.id GROUP BY a.id, a.external_id, a.name, aa.active_alert_count, aa.critical_alert_count ) SELECT app_id AS __value, app_name || ' | ' || operational_status || ' | alerts=' || active_alerts AS __text FROM app_board ORDER BY CASE operational_status WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'degraded' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, active_alerts DESC, app_name

title: NOC Support
